channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government introduces policy requiring 20% of new gas production to be sold domestically
item.description: The Albanese Government has announced a national gas reservation policy requiring Queensland’s three main LNG exporters to sell 20 per cent of any new gas they produce into the domestic market from Ju...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari's Aide Chandranath Rath Shot Dead in Targeted Attack
item.description: Chandranath Rath, an aide to West Bengal politician Suvendu Adhikari, was tragically shot dead in a premeditated attack. Reports indicate that the assailants used a vehicle with a fake number plate to...

item.title: Safaricom Posts Sh100 Billion Profit Driven by M-Pesa, Data and Ethiopia Operations
item.description: Safaricom has recorded a remarkable 67.3 percent increase in net profit, reaching Sh100 billion for the 2025/26 financial year. This growth is mainly due to strong performance in its mobile money plat...

item.title: Investigation of Hantavirus Cases on Cruise Ship Highlights Possible Transmission Sources
item.description: A cluster of hantavirus cases has emerged on the cruise ship MV Hondius, with eight reported cases and three confirmed by laboratory testing. Recent reports indicate three passengers have died, and so...

item.title: Dave Callaghan’s Lasting Influence on Eastern Cape Cricket
item.description: Former Proteas all-rounder Dave Callaghan, now living a peaceful life in St Francis near Gqeberha, remains deeply involved in Eastern Cape cricket. Despite having battled testicular cancer during his ...

item.title: CI Games Faces Backlash Over Female Armor Designs in Lords of the Fallen 2
item.description: CI Games, the studio behind the upcoming dark fantasy RPG 'Lords of the Fallen 2,' recently sparked controversy by paying a gaming YouTuber, TheBackgroundNPC, to promote new female armor designs. The ...

item.title: Premier Smith criticizes NDP over voter list privacy breach linked to separatist website
item.description: Premier Danielle Smith has publicly criticised the Alberta NDP for not informing her government about a significant privacy breach involving the personal information of nearly three million voters. Th...

item.title: Opta gives Arsenal slight edge over PSG ahead of 2026 Champions League final
item.description: Opta’s supercomputer has projected Arsenal as slight favourites to win the 2026 UEFA Champions League final against Paris Saint-Germain (PSG). According to the simulations, Arsenal have a 55.76% chanc...

item.title: Konga Starts Month-Long Tech Sales Campaign with Discounts Across Nigeria
item.description: Konga don start one month-long technology sales campaign wey dem dey call 'Konga Tech Month', wey go run from 1st to 31st May 2026. The campaign dey aimed at make more Nigerians get access to authenti...

item.title: Page Not Found on Tanzania SGR Financing Article
item.description: The news article that was supposed to discuss syndicated financing for Tanzania’s Standard Gauge Railway (SGR) is unfortunately unavailable. When attempting to access it, readers are met with a 'Page ...

item.title: Nyanzaga Gold Project Set to Boost Tanzania's Mining and Economy
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has welcomed the $523 million investment in the Nyanzaga Gold Project as a key step to strengthen Tanzania's mining sector and push forward economic transformation. Durin...

item.title: Kitchener Rangers defeat Barrie Colts in Game 1 of 2026 OHL Championship Series
item.description: The Kitchener Rangers defeated the Barrie Colts in the opening game of the 2026 Ontario Hockey League (OHL) Championship Series. The Rangers, who finished the regular season with a strong record, show...

item.title: Government Proposes Revised eCitizen Fees to Align With Service Costs
item.description: The Kenyan government under President William Ruto has proposed new regulations that will increase fees for eCitizen services. The move is aimed at aligning charges with the actual cost of service del...

item.title: SpaceX IPO Grants Elon Musk Extensive Control Over Company Decisions
item.description: SpaceX is set to go public later this year, but the company’s IPO plan gives Elon Musk near-total control over its operations. Through supervoting shares, stricter rules on shareholder proposals, mand...

item.title: FAAN To Honour Staff Who Returned Lost Money And Passports At MMIA
item.description: For plenty people, finding a purse with $1,700 and important passports for British and Nigerian nationals go fit turn their day upside down. But for one casual worker for FAAN, Mr. Frank Omorojie, him...

item.title: Everus Construction Group Reports Strong Q1 2026 Results with Record Revenue and Raised Guidance
item.description: Everus Construction Group, Inc. (ECG) released its Q1 2026 earnings call transcript, highlighting robust financial performance for the period. The company reported revenue of $1.04 billion, up 25.4% y...

item.title: Manwin Hotel Owner Files $15M Lawsuit Against Winnipeg Over Fire Incident
item.description: The owner of the Manwin Hotel in Winnipeg has filed a lawsuit against the City of Winnipeg seeking $15 million in damages. The legal action follows a recent fire at the vacant hotel located on Main St...

item.title: RSTV Marks 41 Years, Permanent Secretary Urges Innovation and Revenue Growth
item.description: For the 41st anniversary of Rivers State Television (RSTV), the Permanent Secretary of the Rivers State Ministry of Information and Communications, Dr. Honour Sirawoo, don remind RSTV management and s...

item.title: Successful World Relays in Gaborone highlight Africa’s readiness for major athletics events
item.description: Gaborone’s successful hosting of the World Relays has strengthened the argument that Africa, particularly sub-Saharan Africa, is ready to stage more top-tier athletics events. Despite its relatively s...

item.title: Chatsworth Community Set to Benefit from R530 Million Infrastructure and Service Upgrades
item.description: Residents of Chatsworth, Bluff, and Montclair raised concerns about the 2026/2027 draft budget presented by eThekwini Mayor Cyril Xaba at the Nelson Mandela Youth Centre. The city's total budget stand...
